twitter_thread: 85% of Amazon Prime Day fitness equipment is returned within 6 months, with 40% citing lack of space.
Top return reasons: 30% poor assembly, 25% unrealistic expectations, and 20% lack of use.
Compact equipment like resistance bands ($5-10) and folding treadmills ($200-300) reduce returns.
Kettlebells, jump ropes, and adjustable dumbbells are effective for 75% of home workouts.
Equipment with thin steel (<2mm) or weak welding fails 50% faster than better-made alternatives.
Peloton bikes have a 12% 1-year return rate, compared to 30% for budget spin bikes.
What's the most effective fitness equipment you've used at home? #fitness #homegym
